create.title: AI Interview Simulation
create.notEnoughTokens: You don't have enough tokens. Each simulation costs 2 tokens.
create.errorGenerating: Error generating simulation. Please try again.
create.subtitle: Generate a personalized interview simulation based on a real job posting.
create.afterGenNote: After generating, you can choose between text or video simulation with AI analysis.
create.howStep1: Our AI analyzes the job posting in detail
create.howStep2: Generates technical, behavioral, and situational questions
create.howStep3: Includes specific tips for each question
create.howStep4: Provides important keywords for your answers
create.jobLinkHint: Paste the complete job link (LinkedIn, Gupy, Infojobs, Glassdoor, Indeed)
create.experienceLevelHint: Helps customize the difficulty of questions for your experience
create.invalidUrlError: Please enter a valid job link from one of the supported sites: LinkedIn, Gupy, Infojobs, Glassdoor, or Indeed
create.successWithDeduction: Interview simulation generated successfully! 2 tokens have been deducted.

detail.chooseMode: Choose the ideal simulation mode for you.
detail.timeStartWarning: Once started, the timer will begin.
detail.simulationNotAvailable: This simulation is not available or has no questions.
detail.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find the data for this simulation. It may have been removed.
detail.aiAnalyzingVideo: Our AI is analyzing your video to generate detailed feedback.
detail.moreQuestionsWaiting: And {{count}} more questions waiting for you...

play.answerPlaceholder: Type your answer here... Feel free to structure your thoughts.
play.aboutSimulationDesc1: This is a safe simulation for you to practice. Your answers will be analyzed by AI, which will provide constructive feedback on strengths and areas for improvement.
play.aboutSimulationDesc2: If you don't know how to answer, try explaining your reasoning or how you would seek the solution. That's also evaluated!

videoRecorder.cameraPermissionToast: Camera/microphone permission required to record videos
videoRecorder.recordAtLeastOne: Record at least one answer before finishing
videoRecorder.submissionSuccess: Simulation submitted! Analysis will be processed.
videoRecorder.submissionError: Error submitting simulation. Please try again.
videoRecorder.cameraAccessDesc: Please allow camera and microphone access to continue.

myInterviews.title: My Simulations
myInterviews.emptyState: You haven't created any simulations yet.
myInterviews.subtitle: Track your progress and keep practicing to land your dream job.
myInterviews.emptyStateDesc: You haven't created any simulations yet. Create your first interview based on a real job posting and start practicing now!
myInterviews.simulationNotAvailable: This simulation is not available or has no questions.
myInterviews.helpDesc: Here you practice for real interviews! The AI acts as a recruiter, creating technical and behavioral questions based on the job. It gives you preparation tips, you record a video answering the questions. At the end, you receive detailed feedback on your answers.

attempts.title: Video Attempts
attempts.subtitle: Track your video recordings and AI analyses
attempts.emptyDesc: Record your first video answer to receive detailed AI analysis.
attempts.subtitleWithTitle: Track your video recordings for "{{title}}" and see AI analyses.
attempts.subtitleDefault: Track your video recordings and see AI analyses to improve your performance.

videoAnalysis.noMomentsFound: No moments found for this filter.
videoAnalysis.question: Question {{number}}
videoAnalysis.loadingDesc: Decryption and biometric processing in progress...
videoAnalysis.processingDesc: Our AI is currently processing your video content. This usually takes 1-2 minutes.
